posts.text:
The Pentagon has identified all 6 of the US servicemembers killed during a refueling accident Thursday in Iraq in operations to support the war in Iran.  

cnn.com/2026/03/14/politics/…

Major Alex Klinner has been named by his family as the 2nd of 6 US service members killed in Thursday’s refueling operation to support the US war against Iran.  He leaves behind a wife and three children. (Photos from GoFundMe set up to support the family gofundme.com/f/major-alex-kl…)

Folks should read the story being derided here:

nytimes.com/2001/10/31/world…



Ari Fleischer (@AriFleischer)

Today’s media cheer against the US, overstate enemy abilities, understate ours and paint a picture that the US is losing, while we’re winning. It’s more true today as they cheer against Trump in Iran. 

Within 10 days weeks of this 2001 NYT doozy saying our military efforts in Afghanistan were bogged down, the key city of Mazar e Sharif fell to the US and our ally the Northern Allianc

One of the 6 servicemembers killed in the refueling accident Thursday has been identified by his family: Tech. Sgt. Tyler Simmons, 28, 121st Air Refueling Wing at Rickenbacker Air National Guard Base. 

His family spoke to WSYX in Ohio:

abc6onyourside.com/news/loca…
